title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google has released Gemma-4 12B, a multimodal language model designed for local inference on consumer laptops with around 16GB VRAM. The model supports agentic workflows and integrates with frameworks like LiteRT-LM, Ollama, and AI Edge Gallery. It includes multi-token prediction drafters to reduce latency and features an encoder-free architecture for text, vision, and audio.
